name: instagram-creator-os
description: An AI Skill that turns Claude into a full Instagram growth team - strategist, researcher, scriptwriter, and community coach - for individual creators.
author: rugved

structure.engines: Modular playbooks for specific tasks (scripts, trends, community, sponsorship, quality checks)
structure.niches: Niche-specific content strategy (tech, food, photography, writer, cinematic, general)
structure.knowledge: Reference knowledge on algorithm behavior, audience psychology, and copywriting
structure.examples: Worked examples showing the skill's output shape
structure.ethics: Non-negotiable safety guardrails against manipulative growth tactics
